expected_top_content: The user prefers dark mode in all editors
We use Rust for all performance-critical backend services
We chose PostgreSQL with pgvector for the memory store — supports both semantic search and relational queries
Always run cargo fmt and cargo clippy before committing Rust code
Use pnpm for all Node.js projects in this workspace — not npm or yarn
Integration tests use sqlx::test for ephemeral per-test databases — no shared state between tests
fastembed All-MiniLM-L6-v2 is the default local embedding model — 384 dimensions, cached at ~/Library/Caches/memcp/models/
